prompt: Order these visual media milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Oldest surviving photo
events.fact: 1826 — Niépce captures 'View from the Window at Le Gras'

events.title: Kodak camera introduced
events.fact: 1888 — George Eastman's 'You press the button, we do the rest'

events.title: Lumière brothers short films
events.fact: 1895 — first public screening of projected motion pictures

events.title: The Jazz Singer (talkie)
events.fact: 1927 — first feature-length film with synchronized dialogue

events.title: Snow White (animated)
events.fact: 1937 — Disney's first full-length cell animated movie
